item.title: Recover Mac Deleted Files [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Recover Mac Deleted Files [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: memorycardrecovery
item.itunes:summary:
Recover Mac Deleted Files
(Utilities)
Specialist Recover Mac Deleted Files software offers perfect solution to recover deleted and missing data from USB disk drives on Apple Macintosh computer in simplest and reliable manner. With support of versatile and flexible Mac data salvage application users can get back valuable documents, favorite songs, priceless images, video clippings, memorable snapshots and family photographs in minimal time and cost. Advanced Mac data revival program provides preview facility of retrieved data before final restoration to recover desired files and folders according to user requirement and save on specified location in Mac system. Highly effective and powerful Mac drive recovery application facilitates to restore deleted data from different brands of USB storage devices like Transcends, Kingston, Samsung, PQI, Canon, Olympus and many others in smooth and secure way. Mac USB media data rescue tool is easy to operate and supports interactive working environment to retrieve data by both technical and non technical users without requiring any professional expertise. Company offers trial version of Recover Mac Deleted Files utility on website for users to easily download and understand software capabilities before buying full featured application. Software provides excellent feature to regain missing and lost files even device is crashed, formatted, inaccessible, undetectable or infected by viruses without degrading quality of real data.Features:* Innovative and professional Mac recovery software restores lost files, pictures and video clips from pen drive on Macintosh PC.* Offers advanced disk scanning technology to safely recover deleted and damaged data from USB storage media in few mouse clicks.* Mac pen drive data revival tool effectively works on all popular Mac operating systems like Mac OSX and other Apple Macintosh computer.

[read more]
item.description:
Recover Mac Deleted Files
(Utilities)
Specialist Recover Mac Deleted Files software offers perfect solution to recover deleted and missing data from USB disk drives on Apple Macintosh computer in simplest and reliable manner. With support of versatile and flexible Mac data salvage application users can get back valuable documents, favorite songs, priceless images, video clippings, memorable snapshots and family photographs in minimal time and cost. Advanced Mac data revival program provides preview facility of retrieved data before final restoration to recover desired files and folders according to user requirement and save on specified location in Mac system. Highly effective and powerful Mac drive recovery application facilitates to restore deleted data from different brands of USB storage devices like Transcends, Kingston, Samsung, PQI, Canon, Olympus and many others in smooth and secure way. Mac USB media data rescue tool is easy to operate and supports interactive working environment to retrieve data by both technical and non technical users without requiring any professional expertise. Company offers trial version of Recover Mac Deleted Files utility on website for users to easily download and understand software capabilities before buying full featured application. Software provides excellent feature to regain missing and lost files even device is crashed, formatted, inaccessible, undetectable or infected by viruses without degrading quality of real data.Features:* Innovative and professional Mac recovery software restores lost files, pictures and video clips from pen drive on Macintosh PC.* Offers advanced disk scanning technology to safely recover deleted and damaged data from USB storage media in few mouse clicks.* Mac pen drive data revival tool effectively works on all popular Mac operating systems like Mac OSX and other Apple Macintosh computer.

[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Recover Mac Deleted Files
(Utilities)
Specialist Recover Mac Deleted Files software offers perfect solution to recover deleted and missing data from USB disk drives on Apple Macintosh computer in simplest and reliable manner. With support of versatile and flexible Mac data salvage application users can get back valuable documents, favorite songs, priceless images, video clippings, memorable snapshots and family photographs in minimal time and cost. Advanced Mac data revival program provides preview facility of retrieved data before final restoration to recover desired files and folders according to user requirement and save on specified location in Mac system. Highly effective and powerful Mac drive recovery application facilitates to restore deleted data from different brands of USB storage devices like Transcends, Kingston, Samsung, PQI, Canon, Olympus and many others in smooth and secure way. Mac USB media data rescue tool is easy to operate and supports interactive working environment to retrieve data by both technical and non technical users without requiring any professional expertise. Company offers trial version of Recover Mac Deleted Files utility on website for users to easily download and understand software capabilities before buying full featured application. Software provides excellent feature to regain missing and lost files even device is crashed, formatted, inaccessible, undetectable or infected by viruses without degrading quality of real data.Features:* Innovative and professional Mac recovery software restores lost files, pictures and video clips from pen drive on Macintosh PC.* Offers advanced disk scanning technology to safely recover deleted and damaged data from USB storage media in few mouse clicks.* Mac pen drive data revival tool effectively works on all popular Mac operating systems like Mac OSX and other Apple Macintosh computer.

[read more]

item.title: Barcode Software for Publishers Industry [Office Apps]
item.itunes:title: Barcode Software for Publishers Industry [Office Apps]
item.itunes:author: barcodelabelmaker
item.itunes:summary:
Barcode Software for Publishers Industry
(Office Apps)
Professionally develop www.barcodelabelmakersoftware.com recommends Barcode Software for Publishers to create colorful labels using advance image designing objects like circle, line, pencil, rectangle, ellipse etc. Label maker program is proficient to generate bulk number of bar code labels using sequential, constant and random series. Tag designing application is proficient to create customized labels according to book publishing company requirements.

Tag designing application is proficient to create customized labels according to book publishing company requirements.

item.title: Txt Manager [Text Editors]
item.itunes:title: Txt Manager [Text Editors]
item.itunes:author: ngupiware
item.itunes:summary:
Txt Manager
(Text Editors)
This small application will help you to collect and organize your text files more easily.
Extensions : txt, sh, py, pas, lfm, xml, html, css, php, js, java, perl, asmx, asp, atp, sql, vb

You can :
- Adding Group
- Adding Items
- Export / Import
- Adding Document Password
[read more]

This small application will help you to collect and organize your text files more easily.
Extensions : txt, sh, py, pas, lfm, xml, html, css, php, js, java, perl, asmx, asp, atp, sql, vb

You can :
- Adding Group
- Adding Items
- Export / Import
- Adding Document Password

item.title: Mac Rescue Data Software [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Mac Rescue Data Software [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: memorycardrecovery
item.itunes:summary:
Mac Rescue Data Software
(Utilities)
Are you searching best and affordable software for recover your missing favorite holiday pictures from removable USB drive? Now stop your searching! Company presents advance and powerful Mac Rescue Data software for easily and firstly restores your missing valuable pictures, baby birthday snaps and memorable wedding digital photographs from Macintosh hard disk in convenient and reliable approach. MAC image recovery application includes highly interactive pretty nice looking and impressive graphical interface from those new software users can simply and smoothly control its proficient and magic tools without any special technical skill needs. Specialist Mac Rescue Data utility supports all prominent type of digital data storage medium similar to Secure Digital Card, PDA, Multimedia Card, Pocket Drive, Hard disk, Micro Drive, Compact Flash, Memory Stick PRO, Smart Media, Mobile Phone Memory, Pen Drive and many more. Macintosh digital picture recovery application reliably recuperates missing pictures from all major incidents including unexpectedly virus or worm infection, Accidentally or intentionally deleted picture files, Improper device usage, Logically crashed device, Software or hardware malfunction, unexpected system shutdown, Frequent disk format and many more data loss situations. Powerful Mac Rescue Data application successfully renovates deleted or formatted video clips and pictures from all latest popular and accepted removable devices like SanDisk, Canon, Transcend, Panasonic, Samsung, Ricoh, Memorex, Sanyo, Nikon, Acer, Casio, Memorex, Sony and many more.Features: * Mac Rescue Data software provides perfect methodology for restore your crucial and memorable digital picture from HDD or removable media.* MAC picture recovery application easily renovates all major image extension files like jpeg, riff, mpeg, emf, avi, tiff, jpg, bmp etc.* Digital picture restoration tool supports all major type hard disk drive like SATA, EIDE, ATA, SCSI, IDE.

[read more]

item.title: ZRAM - RAM DRIVE [System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS)]
item.itunes:title: ZRAM - RAM DRIVE [System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS)]
item.itunes:author: revwhiteshadow
item.itunes:summary:
ZRAM - RAM DRIVE
(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))
LETS INCREASE RAM (Z RAM)
DISABLE ZRAM
4GB ZRAM
6GB ZRAM
8GB ZRAM
10GB ZRAM


Gaming on Android has never been more immersive and demanding, thanks to the ever-evolving mobile gaming industry. To achieve peak gaming performance, you need the right tools, and that's where the RAM Drive Magisk Module comes into play. Developed by the talented @revWhiteShadow and powered by GODSPEED MODE, this Magisk module takes your gaming experience to the next level by harnessing the power of zRAM (zram GitHub, zram Android). In this article, we'll explore how this module can supercharge your Android gaming adventure.
Understanding the Power of zRAM

Before diving into the RAM Drive Magisk Module, let's shed some light on zRAM. zRAM, often referred to as "compressed RAM," is a feature that compresses portions of your device's RAM, effectively expanding the available memory. This compression reduces the need for constant read/write operations to your device's storage, resulting in faster performance and improved multitasking capabilities. Essentially, zRAM acts as a bridge between RAM and storage, optimizing memory usage for a seamless user experience.
The RAM Drive Magisk Module: GODSPEED MODE
What Is It?

The RAM Drive Magisk Module is an ingenious creation by @revWhiteShadow, designed to leverage zRAM's capabilities for gaming enthusiasts. Powered by GODSPEED MODE, this module takes full advantage of zRAM to create a RAM disk, allowing you to load game data directly into memory. As a result, your games launch faster, load assets more swiftly, and experience minimal stutters during gameplay.
Key Features

Here are some compelling features that make the RAM Drive Magisk Module a must-have for gamers:

Faster Load Times: Games load almost instantly, reducing the wait time between launching the app and diving into the action.

Smoother Gameplay: Assets are preloaded into memory, reducing in-game stutter and enhancing overall gameplay fluidity.

Reduced I/O Operations: By minimizing read/write operations to your device's storage, this module helps extend the lifespan of your storage hardware.

Customization: You can fine-tune the module's settings to suit your device's capabilities and your gaming preferences.

How to Install the RAM Drive Magisk Module

Root Your Device: Ensure your Android device is rooted using Magisk.

Download the Module: Visit the official source for the RAM Drive Magisk Module. Download the module compatible with your device.

Open Magisk Manager: Launch Magisk Manager on your device.

Install Module: In Magisk Manager, tap on the "Modules" section. Then, click on the "+" button or the "Install from storage" option.

Select the Module: Browse to the location where you downloaded the RAM Drive Magisk Module and select it.

Reboot: After installation, reboot your device to activate the module.

Configure the Module: Once your device restarts, open the module's interface through Magisk Manager. Configure the settings to your liking.

Conclusion

The RAM Drive Magisk Module, powered by GODSPEED MODE and built upon the foundation of zRAM (zram GitHub, zram Android), unlocks the full potential of your Android device for gaming. With faster load times, smoother gameplay, and reduced strain on your device's storage, you'll experience gaming like never before. If you're passionate about mobile gaming and want to elevate your gaming performance, this Magisk module is a game-changer that shouldn't be overlooked. Install it, configure it, and immerse yourself in a world of uninterrupted gaming pleasure.
[read more]

ZRAM - RAM DRIVE
(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))
LETS INCREASE RAM (Z RAM)
DISABLE ZRAM
4GB ZRAM
6GB ZRAM
8GB ZRAM
10GB ZRAM


Gaming on Android has never been more immersive and demanding, thanks to the ever-evolving mobile gaming industry. To achieve peak gaming performance, you need the right tools, and that's where the RAM Drive Magisk Module comes into play. Developed by the talented @revWhiteShadow and powered by GODSPEED MODE, this Magisk module takes your gaming experience to the next level by harnessing the power of zRAM (zram GitHub, zram Android). In this article, we'll explore how this module can supercharge your Android gaming adventure.
Understanding the Power of zRAM

Before diving into the RAM Drive Magisk Module, let's shed some light on zRAM. zRAM, often referred to as "compressed RAM," is a feature that compresses portions of your device's RAM, effectively expanding the available memory. This compression reduces the need for constant read/write operations to your device's storage, resulting in faster performance and improved multitasking capabilities. Essentially, zRAM acts as a bridge between RAM and storage, optimizing memory usage for a seamless user experience.

How to Install the RAM Drive Magisk Module

Open Magisk Manager: Launch Magisk Manager on your device.

Install Module: In Magisk Manager, tap on the "Modules" section. Then, click on the "+" button or the "Install from storage" option.

Select the Module: Browse to the location where you downloaded the RAM Drive Magisk Module and select it.

Reboot: After installation, reboot your device to activate the module.

Configure the Module: Once your device restarts, open the module's interface through Magisk Manager. Configure the settings to your liking.

Conclusion

The RAM Drive Magisk Module, powered by GODSPEED MODE and built upon the foundation of zRAM (zram GitHub, zram Android), unlocks the full potential of your Android device for gaming. With faster load times, smoother gameplay, and reduced strain on your device's storage, you'll experience gaming like never before. If you're passionate about mobile gaming and want to elevate your gaming performance, this Magisk module is a game-changer that shouldn't be overlooked. Install it, configure it, and immerse yourself in a world of uninterrupted gaming pleasure.
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
ZRAM - RAM DRIVE
(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))
LETS INCREASE RAM (Z RAM)
DISABLE ZRAM
4GB ZRAM
6GB ZRAM
8GB ZRAM
10GB ZRAM


Gaming on Android has never been more immersive and demanding, thanks to the ever-evolving mobile gaming industry. To achieve peak gaming performance, you need the right tools, and that's where the RAM Drive Magisk Module comes into play. Developed by the talented @revWhiteShadow and powered by GODSPEED MODE, this Magisk module takes your gaming experience to the next level by harnessing the power of zRAM (zram GitHub, zram Android). In this article, we'll explore how this module can supercharge your Android gaming adventure.
Understanding the Power of zRAM

Before diving into the RAM Drive Magisk Module, let's shed some light on zRAM. zRAM, often referred to as "compressed RAM," is a feature that compresses portions of your device's RAM, effectively expanding the available memory. This compression reduces the need for constant read/write operations to your device's storage, resulting in faster performance and improved multitasking capabilities. Essentially, zRAM acts as a bridge between RAM and storage, optimizing memory usage for a seamless user experience.
The RAM Drive Magisk Module: GODSPEED MODE
What Is It?

The RAM Drive Magisk Module is an ingenious creation by @revWhiteShadow, designed to leverage zRAM's capabilities for gaming enthusiasts. Powered by GODSPEED MODE, this module takes full advantage of zRAM to create a RAM disk, allowing you to load game data directly into memory. As a result, your games launch faster, load assets more swiftly, and experience minimal stutters during gameplay.
Key Features

Here are some compelling features that make the RAM Drive Magisk Module a must-have for gamers:

Faster Load Times: Games load almost instantly, reducing the wait time between launching the app and diving into the action.

Smoother Gameplay: Assets are preloaded into memory, reducing in-game stutter and enhancing overall gameplay fluidity.

Reduced I/O Operations: By minimizing read/write operations to your device's storage, this module helps extend the lifespan of your storage hardware.

Customization: You can fine-tune the module's settings to suit your device's capabilities and your gaming preferences.

How to Install the RAM Drive Magisk Module

Root Your Device: Ensure your Android device is rooted using Magisk.

Download the Module: Visit the official source for the RAM Drive Magisk Module. Download the module compatible with your device.

Open Magisk Manager: Launch Magisk Manager on your device.

Install Module: In Magisk Manager, tap on the "Modules" section. Then, click on the "+" button or the "Install from storage" option.

Select the Module: Browse to the location where you downloaded the RAM Drive Magisk Module and select it.

Reboot: After installation, reboot your device to activate the module.

Configure the Module: Once your device restarts, open the module's interface through Magisk Manager. Configure the settings to your liking.

Conclusion

The RAM Drive Magisk Module, powered by GODSPEED MODE and built upon the foundation of zRAM (zram GitHub, zram Android), unlocks the full potential of your Android device for gaming. With faster load times, smoother gameplay, and reduced strain on your device's storage, you'll experience gaming like never before. If you're passionate about mobile gaming and want to elevate your gaming performance, this Magisk module is a game-changer that shouldn't be overlooked. Install it, configure it, and immerse yourself in a world of uninterrupted gaming pleasure.
[read more]

item.title: Digital Camera Recovery Tool [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Digital Camera Recovery Tool [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: memorycardrecovery
item.itunes:summary:
Digital Camera Recovery Tool
(Utilities)
Digital Camera Recovery software recovers deleted digital photographs, images, audio clippings in different file extensions like jpeg, gif, and bmp with minimum time spam. Award winning picture recovery application regains accidently erased video files, wedding snapshots, and images from storage devices without losing original file integrity.www.digitalcamerarecovery.org provides easy to use Digital Camera Recovery software which is used by non technical person. Efficient image recovery software provides interactive interface to regain inaccessible data from memory card of digital camera with minimum time spam. Company provides trial version of Digital Camera Recovery software to determine function of application. Easy to download digital camera data recovery software is economical solution to preview lost data before actual recovery. Download Digital Camera picture Recovery application from www.digitalcamerarecovery.org to recover desired deleted data in few countable easy steps. Time saving image recovery application is comprehensive solution to regain mistakenly deleted audio clipping, video, and birthday photographs files from memory card of digital camera with small time and price. Digital Camera picture Recovery application is capable to supports all popular types of digicam media storage device.Features:* Digital Camera picture Recovery application restores deleted data when error is displayed on computer system with minimum efforts.*Picture recovery software provides user friendly interface to determine and analysis software features and functions.* Digital camera data recovery software is easily handled by any user without any technical knowledge.*Images recovery application recovers erased photographs from storage device and saves at specific location on computer system.

[read more]
item.description:

Digital Camera picture Recovery application is capable to supports all popular types of digicam media storage device.Features:* Digital Camera picture Recovery application restores deleted data when error is displayed on computer system with minimum efforts.*Picture recovery software provides user friendly interface to determine and analysis software features and functions.* Digital camera data recovery software is easily handled by any user without any technical knowledge.*Images recovery application recovers erased photographs from storage device and saves at specific location on computer system.

Download Digital Camera picture Recovery application from www.digitalcamerarecovery.org to recover desired deleted data in few countable easy steps. Time saving image recovery application is comprehensive solution to regain mistakenly deleted audio clipping, video, and birthday photographs files from memory card of digital camera with small time and price. Digital Camera picture Recovery application is capable to supports all popular types of digicam media storage device.Features:* Digital Camera picture Recovery application restores deleted data when error is displayed on computer system with minimum efforts.*Picture recovery software provides user friendly interface to determine and analysis software features and functions.* Digital camera data recovery software is easily handled by any user without any technical knowledge.*Images recovery application recovers erased photographs from storage device and saves at specific location on computer system.

item.title: Prospect Mail [Email]
item.itunes:title: Prospect Mail [Email]
item.itunes:author: hb882
item.itunes:summary:
Prospect Mail
(Email)
Unofficial email Outlook client using Electron. It uses the Web App and wraps it as a standalone application using Electron. This only works for Microsoft/Office 365 accounts, don't use it for personal Outlook.com accounts.
NOTE: This is only to provide appimages, I am not the developer.
[read more]

[read more]
